# jamfprotect_api_clients (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all API clients in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all API clients in Jamf Protect.
data "jamfprotect_api_clients" "all" {}

# Output the API client names.
output "api_client_names" {
  value = [for client in data.jamfprotect_api_clients.all.api_clients : client.name]
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_clients` (Attributes List) The list of API clients. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--api_clients))

<a id="nestedatt--api_clients"></a>
### Nested Schema for `api_clients`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the API client.
- `name` (String) The name of the API client.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The API client secret (masked when listed).
- `role_ids` (List of String) Role IDs assigned to the API client.
